x_ai_rules_hooks_lifecycle.reason: Codex hooks runtime is intentionally isolated for the first hooks release; source is retained for tests and future wrapper generation.
x_ai_rules_hooks_lifecycle.parserSafety: The active hooks object is intentionally empty, so Codex hook parsers have no command handlers to execute.

encodedCommand.authority: Source behavior lives in team-native-gate.ps1; encoded launchers are generated artifacts only when hooks runtime is explicitly re-enabled.
